title: In-memory payment session map + ClearMessage::Payment dispatch
description: Add HashMap<Uuid, PaymentSession> to the chat event loop state in cli/src/commands.rs. Replace the 'ClearMessage::Ack { .. } | ClearMessage::Payment { .. } => { // Not yet implemented — ignore }' arm with a dispatch function that routes Payment messages to a session handler. The handler looks up the session by session_id; if not found, sends PaymentAction::Unknown back to the sender. This is the shared foundation for both payer and payee state machines.
